quests.title: Minimalist Architecture
quests.description: Find a building or structure with clean, minimalist lines.

quests.title: Leading Lines
quests.description: Take a photo where lines naturally guide the viewer's eye.

quests.title: Neon Glow
quests.description: Capture the aesthetic glow of a neon sign at night.

quests.title: Coffee Culture
quests.description: Document your coffee or tea ritual today.

quests.title: Hidden Patterns
quests.description: Find a repeating pattern in nature or urban environment.

quests.title: Golden Hour
quests.description: Take a photo during the last hour of sunlight.

quests.title: Solitude
quests.description: Capture a feeling of peaceful solitude.

quests.title: Macro Details
quests.description: Get extremely close to a small object and photograph its texture.

quests.title: Symmetry
quests.description: Find perfect symmetry in your surroundings.

quests.title: Reflection
quests.description: Use a puddle, mirror, or window to capture a reflection.

quests.title: Silhouette
quests.description: Photograph a subject against a bright light source.

quests.title: Vintage Aesthetic
quests.description: Find something that looks like it belongs in another decade.

quests.title: Urban Jungle
quests.description: Capture nature fighting back in a city environment.

quests.title: Monochrome Challenge
quests.description: Take a photo where everything naturally appears to be one color.

quests.title: Street Art
quests.description: Document a beautiful piece of graffiti or street art.

quests.title: Rainy Mood
quests.description: Capture the mood of a rainy day (or water droplets).

quests.title: Abstract Light
quests.description: Play with light to create an abstract composition.

quests.title: Cozy Corner
quests.description: Photograph a space that feels incredibly cozy.

quests.title: Motion Blur
quests.description: Capture movement intentionally using blur.

quests.title: Framing
quests.description: Use natural elements (like a doorway or branches) to frame your subject.

quests.title: Local Bakery
quests.description: Visit a local bakery and capture the fresh goods.

quests.title: Long Exposure
quests.description: Try to capture the movement of light over time.

quests.title: Old Book
quests.description: Find an old book and photograph its texture or pages.

quests.title: Abandoned
quests.description: Photograph an abandoned object or place.

quests.title: Wildflower
quests.description: Find and photograph a lone wildflower.

quests.title: Overhead Shot
quests.description: Take a photo looking straight down at something interesting.

quests.title: Shadow Play
quests.description: Capture interesting shadows cast by everyday objects.

quests.title: Public Transport
quests.description: Document your journey on public transport.

quests.title: Lens Flare
quests.description: Intentionally catch a lens flare from the sun.

quests.title: Local Wildlife
quests.description: Photograph an animal in its natural habitat.

quests.title: Market Day
quests.description: Capture the vibrant atmosphere of a local market.

quests.title: Low Angle
quests.description: Take a photo looking up from the ground.

quests.title: High Angle
quests.description: Take a photo looking down from a high vantage point.

quests.title: Textures of the City
quests.description: Focus on the rough textures of urban materials like brick or concrete.

quests.title: A Pop of Color
quests.description: Find a scene that is mostly dull with one bright pop of color.

quests.title: Candid Moment
quests.description: Capture a genuine, unposed moment.

quests.title: Window View
quests.description: Photograph the world outside your window.

quests.title: Bridges
quests.description: Find and photograph a bridge, focusing on its structure.

quests.title: Morning Dew
quests.description: Capture the morning dew on grass or leaves.

quests.title: Starry Night
quests.description: Try to capture the stars or the night sky.

quests.title: Industrial Aesthetics
quests.description: Photograph industrial machinery or facilities.

quests.title: Vintage Cars
quests.description: Find and photograph a classic or vintage car.

quests.title: Fountains
quests.description: Capture the flow and splash of a water fountain.

quests.title: Bicycles
quests.description: Photograph a bicycle parked in an interesting location.

quests.title: Library Silence
quests.description: Capture the quiet atmosphere of a library or bookstore.

quests.title: Music
quests.description: Photograph someone playing an instrument or listening to music.

quests.title: Sporting Action
quests.description: Capture the dynamic energy of a sport being played.

quests.title: Statues
quests.description: Find and photograph a statue or sculpture.

quests.title: Sunburst
quests.description: Capture a sunburst effect through trees or buildings.

quests.title: Reflections in Glasses
quests.description: Take a photo of what is reflected in a pair of sunglasses or a window.
